response.justification: Bogdan is a staff-level engineer with strong distributed systems expertise and current experience in an AI-native environment, making him technically qualified for seniority and domain. However, the absence of Python—a stated must-have—is a material gap. His very recent transition to AI-native engineering (April 2025) means limited proven depth in agentic code review patterns, though his background suggests strong learning ability. His operational experience is DevOps/infrastructure-heavy rather than on-call and incident-response focused.
strengths: Staff-level engineer with proven ownership and systems thinking across multiple organizations
Direct experience with high-throughput distributed systems (millions of requests/sec) and microservices architecture
Currently working in AI-native environment with agentic workflows and developer tooling
concerns: No Python experience listed, though strong Python is a stated must-have technical requirement
Very recent to AI-native engineering environment (April 2025); limited proven depth in agentic code review patterns
Operational experience is DevOps/infrastructure-focused rather than on-call, incident-response, or monitoring

key_factors.factor: Current staff-level role in AI-native environment
